remarks: Very large, bright, highly desirable top (4th) floor 1 BR unit in the heart of Newfield Area. Hardwood floors throughout. Huge LR/ DA with sliders to large private terrace. Kitchen with dishwasher and breakfast bar. Large foyer with double closet. Large primary bedroom. Excellent closet space/ storage. Open floor plan with a terrific flow for entertaining. Elevator building, on-site super, coin-op laundry on every floor. Walk to Worship/ Shops/ Restaurants/ Park/ Playground. On bus line. One off-street assigned parking space included with rent. Second space $50 additional fee per month (limited availability.) Cat considered with one time, non-refundable $250 pet rent per cat. Excellent credit and proof of income required. Photos are of similar unit.
